properties.name: firefly.executor.auto-start
properties.description: Whether the executor client starts automatically with the Spring context.

properties.name: firefly.executor.scheduler-host
properties.description: Fallback Firefly gateway host when gateway-addresses is empty.

properties.name: firefly.executor.scheduler-port
properties.description: Fallback Firefly gateway port when gateway-addresses is empty.

properties.name: firefly.executor.gateway-addresses
properties.description: Firefly gateway addresses in host:port form. The client connects to every configured gateway.

properties.name: firefly.executor.instance-id
properties.description: Stable identity of this service replica. Configure a value unique per replica to replace an old session immediately after restart.

properties.name: firefly.executor.heartbeat-interval
properties.description: Interval between executor heartbeats.

properties.name: firefly.executor.reconnect-initial-delay
properties.description: Initial reconnect delay after a gateway connection failure.

properties.name: firefly.executor.reconnect-max-delay
properties.description: Maximum reconnect delay after repeated gateway connection failures.

properties.name: firefly.executor.idempotency-retention
properties.description: Retention of persisted executor results used for delivery deduplication.

properties.name: firefly.executor.tls-enabled
properties.description: Whether TLS is enabled for gateway connections.

properties.name: firefly.executor.tls-verify-hostname
properties.description: Whether the gateway TLS certificate hostname is verified.

properties.name: firefly.executor.business-idempotency.enabled
properties.description: Whether a JDBC business idempotency store is auto-configured from the application DataSource.

properties.name: firefly.executor.business-idempotency.abandoned-claim-timeout
properties.description: Time after which an unfinished business idempotency claim may be taken over.

properties.name: firefly.executor.business-idempotency.table-name
properties.description: Business idempotency table name.

properties.name: firefly.executor.job-registration.enabled
properties.description: Whether @FireflyJob declarations and programmatic FireflyJobRegistration beans are synchronized after the Spring application is ready.

properties.name: firefly.executor.job-registration.admin-url
properties.description: Base URL of the Firefly Admin API used for startup job registration.

properties.name: firefly.executor.job-registration.admin-token
properties.description: Admin API token used for startup job registration. Creating a job requires an ADMIN role token.

properties.name: firefly.executor.job-registration.update-existing
properties.description: Whether an existing job is updated from its Spring declaration. Disabled by default to preserve console changes.

properties.name: firefly.executor.job-registration.fail-fast
properties.description: Whether startup fails when one or more declared jobs cannot be synchronized.

properties.name: firefly.executor.job-registration.max-attempts
properties.description: Maximum synchronization attempts per declared job.

properties.name: firefly.executor.job-registration.retry-delay
properties.description: Delay between startup job synchronization attempts.

properties.name: firefly.executor.job-registration.request-timeout
properties.description: Timeout for each Firefly Admin API request.
